history.details: v0.3.0 spec covering 6 areas: enriched diagnostics (P0), structured MCP responses (P0), world model fixes (P0), schema enhancement (P1), dynamic prompts (P1), PlanValidator (P2). 14 files modified, 1 new file. 50+ test contracts defined.
17 tasks across 3 phases (8 P0, 4 P1, 5 P2). 8 execution waves for Alpha/Beta/Gamma parallel execution. 56 new tests across 8 test files. Every change mapped to exact file, function, and line range.

17 tasks (T1-T18, T10 merged into T11) converted from plan.md into task.md with TDD deliverables, acceptance criteria, dependency graph, and 8 execution waves. Status set to approved, phase set to execute.
